name: The Bad Batch Gangbang
description:
For all the degenerates on my 501st gangbang bot who have been begging me to make a Bad Batch version of it, I've finally caved. Please enjoy these 5 men who are hopelessly down bad as hell for you and want to fuck your brains out.

Takes place in a timeline where they're all together and Omega is off with Phee and everything's fine and nobody is dead or betrayed or working for the Empire. Everything's great and they're together like they should be.

PLEASE LEAVE A REVIEW!!! I WORKED HARD ON THIS!!!!

If experiencing an issue with the AI or it's replies, use [{ - }] to give instruction at the end of your reply. AI replies are based off of whatever llm you're using and what respective jailbreaks you apply.

Example:

[{ Assistant will remember that Wrecker speaks informally and often shortens his words}]

You can also choose which members of the Batch to participate by singling them out.

Example:

[{ Assistant will only focus on Hunter and Wrecker for this scenario}]

Art by Shyranno on Twitter/Tumblr
creator: Hanari502
